title: Upgrade Structures
description: This datapack allow you to upgrade vanilla structures, to make them better!
body:
# < | Upgrade Structures | >

![BANNER](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Xm8q0hc1/images/422d9482d2bbd3bc2ec14775467d7f49dd20f1dc.jpeg)

![INFO](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/863313318806552586/1035847584415227994/PM-banners-info.png)

This datapack adds new custom armor upgrades found in newly added structures!

Uncover a hidden chest in the new structure, that spawns in deserts, filled with the new special item, 'Ancient Technology Upgrade', which allows you to upgrade your diamond chestplate with new and unique technologies. Then you can craft the new special armor (will give you one random out of the two)

[Download on PMC](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/minecraft-but-you-can-upgrade-structures/)


![FAQ](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/863313318806552586/1035847587061825576/PM-banners-faq.png)

**How many structures are there?** -> There are 7 structures you can upgrade, all with 3 levels, so combined you can get up to **22** completely UNIQUE and CUSTOM structures!

**Java or Bedrock?** -> JAVA

**VERSION?** -> 1.19.2

**How do i get the structures?** -> You craft them, in your inventory you have a **recipe book**, click it to see all the structures, you can click throught the menu, to show the recipes!

![REQUIREMENTS Version: 1.19.2, Optifine: Not Required, Resource Pack: required](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/902472323716775956/1047940692552454144/unknown.png)

Do **/reload** when you join to the world, to start the datapack!

[![PATREON](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/863313318806552586/1035847585937752094/PM-banners-supportPatreon.png)](https://www.patreon.com/diamond_dp/)

Have any questions, join my Discord server: https://discord.com/invite/xRVzmSnHdd

Subscribe me on YouTube : https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCSM2hMUa1LdEPpw5FYwKAyw
